title: Some editing of automatic Emails
excerpt: Hello, if you want to create an Email from Emails & Activities you have some editing capabilities even to have a logo, and even make Templates. But for automatic messages there is only dumb and PLAIN text. Remember Monda…

posts.author: Dran (Daniel MacLean)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, if you want to create an Email from Emails & Activities you have some editing capabilities even to have a logo, and even make Templates. But for automatic messages there is only dumb and PLAIN text. Remember Monday friends, that we are businesses reaching out to clientes, not to friends or colleagues. We need SOME BRANDING, please!! you could connect automatic mails to templates. That would be a middle path.

posts.author: Josh54 (Josh Turgut)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Daniel,

Did you get any answer about that? I am trying to send the survey link via automated email and client gets typeform.com/blabla link which looks very unprofessional.

I hope someone has a solution for that.

Best,
Josh
